name: Curried Chicken & Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Stalk celery, thinly sliced (about 1/2 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Curried Dressing by mixing all ingredients in a bowl and covering. Refrigerate for at least 4 hours, but no longer than 24 hours.
2. Mix chicken, rice, celery, olives, and onion in a large bowl.
3. Add the prepared Curried Dressing to the bowl and toss until evenly coated.
4. Spoon the mixture onto lettuce leaves if desired.
5. Sprinkle with toasted almonds.
Almonds: To toast almonds, preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Place ungreased slivered almonds in a single layer on an ungreased baking sheet and bake for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until golden brown.
Serves 6.
